input.description: Get list of files modified in PR #4
List all PRs to find previous ones
Get PR #3 details with JSON output to avoid deprecation error

input.command: gh pr view 4 --json files --jq '[.files[].path | select(test("^\\.gitban|\\.claude") | not)]'
input.description: Filter core application files from PR #4

input.command: gh pr view 4 --json files --jq '[.files[].path]' | python3 -c "import sys,json; files=json.load(sys.stdin); print('\n'.join(f for f in files if not f.startswith('.gitban') and not f.startswith('.claud...
input.description: Filter core application files from PR #4 using Python
Get all file paths from PR #4

input.command: gh api repos/$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner --jq .nameWithOwner)/pulls/3/reviews 2>&1
gh api repos/$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner --jq .nameWithOwner)/pulls/3/comments 2>&1
input.description: Get inline review comments on PR #3
Get files from PR #3 to check overlap with PR #4

input.command: gh api repos/$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner --jq .nameWithOwner)/issues/3/comments 2>&1
